description: Neatly written accounts in Arabic script and Greek/Coptic numerals. In the first line names Abū l-Faraj al-Ṭaḥḥān. Specific items include lemon, pepper, saffron, mastic, cinnamon, sesame oil, olive oil, a burniyya vessel (spelled برنيية), chicken, linseed oil, cups (? kīzān), earthenware (fakhkhār), date paste (ʿajwa), and ṭaḥīna.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בArabic, Greek/Coptic Numerals. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
